# table_large_scale_characteristics { #cdmconnector.table_large_scale_characteristics }

```python
table_large_scale_characteristics(
    result,
    *,
    top_concepts=None,
    header=None,
    group_column=None,
    hide=None,
)
```

Format a summarise_large_scale_characteristics result into a table.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name         | Type                                          | Description   | Default    |
|--------------|-----------------------------------------------|---------------|------------|
| result       | SummarisedResult or DataFrame.                |               | _required_ |
| top_concepts | If set, limit to top N concepts by frequency. |               | `None`     |
| header       | Columns for header.                           |               | `None`     |
| group_column | Extra grouping columns.                       |               | `None`     |
| hide         | Columns to hide.                              |               | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame |               |
